summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of 3 new features for B2B Cardamom Export platform: Admin Product CRUD, Admin Quote Response, Customer Quote Request. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend UI tests passed (100%). No critical issues found.

issues: Some test products (TEST_Updated_Product_Name, TEST_Product_8mm_Super) showing broken image placeholders due to invalid image URLs from backend tests - minor visual issue

passed_tests: BACKEND: Admin login returns JWT token and correct role
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/products creates new product (admin auth required)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/products returns 401 without auth
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/products returns 403 for customer role
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/products/{id} updates product successfully
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/products/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent product
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} deletes product successfully
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent product
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/quotes returns all quotes for admin
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{id} updates quote with pricing fields (base_price, freight_cost, final_price, currency, admin_notes, status)
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{id} updates status only
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent quote
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/quotes requires auth
BACKEND: POST /api/quotes/request creates domestic quote for approved customer
BACKEND: POST /api/quotes/request creates export quote with destination/shipping for approved customer
BACKEND: POST /api/quotes/request returns 403 for pending customer
BACKEND: POST /api/quotes/request returns 401 without auth
BACKEND: POST /api/quotes/request returns 404 for invalid product_id
BACKEND: GET /api/quotes/my-quotes returns customer's own quotes
BACKEND: GET /api/products returns all products (public)
BACKEND: GET /api/products/{id} returns single product (public)
FRONTEND: Admin Dashboard has 3 tabs (Users Management, Quote Requests, Products)
FRONTEND: Admin Products tab shows list of products with edit/delete buttons
FRONTEND: Admin can open Add Product form with all fields (name, size, description, features, image_url)
FRONTEND: Admin Quote Requests tab shows quote list with Respond to Quote button
FRONTEND: Admin Quote Response form has all pricing fields (base_price, freight_cost, final_price, currency, status, admin_notes)
FRONTEND: Products page shows Request a Quote button on each product card
FRONTEND: Clicking Request a Quote when not logged in opens login modal
FRONTEND: Logged-in approved customer can open quote request modal
FRONTEND: Quote request modal has all fields (quantity, market_type, destination_country, shipping_method, additional_notes)
FRONTEND: Quote request submission works and shows success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Test products created during backend testing have broken image URLs - consider cleanup or seeding with valid test images

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test users with patterns: test_*, quotetest_*, quotecust_*, playwright_e2e_*, fullquote_*@example.com

seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-created on server startup. Products re-initialized on each server restart. Test products and quotes created during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: (1) Admin Product CRUD via /api/admin/products, (2) Admin Quote Response via PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{id} with pricing fields, (3) Customer Quote Request via POST /api/quotes/request (requires approved customer). Full e2e flow tested: register → admin approve → login as customer → request quote → verify in admin dashboard. Products tab has edit/delete per product. Quotes tab has inline response form with pricing fields. LoginModal component is reusable for both Login page and Products page quote flow.
